name: Innovative Digital Investors Acquisition Corp.
business: Innovative Digital Investors Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company incorporated on September 20, 2023, as a Nevada corporation and formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It has not selected any specific business combination target and has not engaged in substantive discussions with any target. The company intends to focus its search for an initial business combination on companies within the financial services industry in North America.
